description: Mode3D and gridless centered-dipole cutoffs should agree within 1 percent away from high-latitude penumbra-sensitive points.
Mode3D and gridless high-latitude cutoffs should agree within 5 percent because these points are more sensitive to penumbra and finite-trajectory classification.
Mode3D analytical-field cutoff should be close to vertical Størmer cutoff at |lat| <= 30 deg.
Gridless cutoff should be close to vertical Størmer cutoff at |lat| <= 30 deg.
Mode3D high-latitude cutoff has looser tolerance because of penumbra and finite escape-classification sensitivity.
Gridless high-latitude cutoff has looser tolerance because of penumbra and finite escape-classification sensitivity.
Centered aligned dipole Mode3D solution should be independent of longitude at fixed altitude and latitude.
Centered aligned dipole gridless solution should be independent of longitude at fixed altitude and latitude.
Centered aligned dipole Mode3D solution should be symmetric between +lat and -lat.
Centered aligned dipole gridless solution should be symmetric between +lat and -lat.
